hero.headline: Make the right decisions before growth becomes expensive.
hero.subheadline: Fardoy works with founders, SMEs, and scaling businesses to bring clarity, structure, and financial direction to critical stages of growth.

capabilities.title: Startup Foundations
capabilities.desc: We help early-stage businesses move from idea to a structured, investment-ready model.

capabilities.title: Performance & Profitability
capabilities.desc: We identify where value is being lost across cost, operations, and decision-making.

capabilities.title: Growth Strategy
capabilities.desc: We help businesses define where growth should come from and how to scale without chaos.

capabilities.title: Digital Systems
capabilities.desc: We turn workflows and routines into scalable systems aligned with the business model.
